_comment: REL-5 Service Monitoring SLOs for the arbor-api Cloud Run service. Four SLOs: availability, interactive latency, AI-sync latency, AI success. 30-day rolling. Availability + latency ride on Cloud Run BUILT-IN request metrics (no app code). AI-success rides on the log-based metric arbor_model_call_outcome (REL-2). BEFORE APPLY: (1) resolve the Service Monitoring service id for arbor-api via `gcloud monitoring services list`; SLOs are created under that service. (2) Apply each entry in `slos[]` separately: `gcloud monitoring slos create --service <SERVICE_ID> --slo-from-file <one-slo.json>` (split this array, or use the API). Targets/windows match docs slis-slos-error-budget.md §3 — keep them in sync.

goodTotalRatio._comment: good = responses NOT 5xx; total = all responses EXCEPT 429 (rate-limit is a correct protective outcome, see SLI-1). Uses Cloud Run built-in request_count sliced by response_code_class.

requestBasedSli._comment: Distribution cut on Cloud Run built-in request_latencies, thresholded at 1000ms. Filter restricts to the interactive/CRUD route prefixes and EXCLUDES SSE routes (/api/chat,/api/voice) and AI-sync routes (covered by arbor-latency-ai). url_map_name / request path filtering on Cloud Run is via metric.label paths where available; if path labels are unavailable in this project, apply this SLO at the service level and rely on the AI-sync SLO's higher threshold to avoid mixing classes — see slis-slos-error-budget.md §2.

AI-sync routes (/api/council, /api/generate-*, /api/extract-log, /api/vision, /api/analyze-behavior, /api/generate-handoff, /api/score-utterance) thresholded at 8000ms. SSE routes still excluded (they are not in this class). If per-path Cloud Run labels are not exposed in this project, see the OPTION-B note in artifacts/README.md to derive this SLI from the existing request log instead.

goodTotalRatio._comment: good = model_call outcome=ok; total = terminal outcomes only (ok+timeout+circuit_open+error). 'retry' is EXCLUDED from both (a retry that later succeeds is not a user-visible failure) — see SLI-3. Source = log-based metric arbor_model_call_outcome (REL-2). Requires that metric to exist first.
